settings_item_branding_title_desc: Controls the browser tab title shown on login, share, and app pages. Leave it empty to fall back to AsterDrive.
settings_item_branding_description_desc: Controls the HTML description metadata exposed before login. Leave it empty to fall back to the default deployment description.
settings_item_branding_favicon_url_desc: Provide a public HTTP(S) or same-origin icon URL. Leave it empty to fall back to /favicon.svg.
settings_item_branding_wordmark_dark_url: Site logo URL for light surfaces
Provide a public HTTP(S) or same-origin logo URL used on headers and other light surfaces. Leave it empty to fall back to /static/asterdrive/asterdrive-dark.svg.
settings_item_branding_wordmark_light_ur: Site logo URL for dark surfaces
Provide a public HTTP(S) or same-origin logo URL used on dark surfaces such as the login hero panel. Leave it empty to fall back to /static/asterdrive/asterdrive-light.svg.
